_comment: HOW TO ADD AN EVENT: Add a new object to the 'events' array below. Required fields: id (unique slug, e.g. 'menlo-dinner-june-2'), title, date (YYYY-MM-DD — use '2099-01-01' if date is TBD), time (e.g. '7:00 PM' — use 'Ask Sachin' if TBD), location, status ('upcoming' or 'past'). Optional: endTime, address, description, rsvpUrl. The host is always Chelsea Commons — no need to change the hosts field.

events.title: Menlo Ventures Dinner
events.description: The kickoff to our weekly dinner series featuring 8–12 exceptional young people and Menlo Ventures! For people thinking of founding or at seed stage.

events.title: Box Group Game Night
events.description: Game night with Box Group for young people curious about founding or working at early stage startups.

events.title: Cory Levy Dinner
events.description: Dinner with the founder of Z-Fellows for exceptional young engineers.

events.title: Poker + Pizza Night
events.description: Poker + Pizza night hosted by Pareto VC for young builders & engineers.

events.title: M13 Dinner
events.description: Come eat and have fun with the team at M13.

events.title: Roboflow Factory Tour / Rooftop Mixer
events.description: An exclusive tour of Roboflow's mini computer vision factory followed by a rooftop hang for young engineers. Date TBD — ask Sachin for details.

events.title: Lerer Hippeau Dinner
events.description: Dinner with Lerer Hippeau for young people curious about founding or working at early stage startups.

events.title: First Round Dinner
events.description: Dinner with First Round Capital for young people curious about founding or startups.

events.title: LvlUp Dinner
events.description: Dinner for young people curious about founding or working at early stage startups.

events.title: Felicis Dinner
events.description: Dinner with Felicis Ventures for young people curious about founding or working at early stage startups. Date TBD.
